description: Trigger and behavior cases for the parameterized gap audit: evidence-based verdicts, UNVERIFIABLE discipline, blocker-first remediation order, shared-gap dividend, no audit opinions.

cases.prompt: We target ISO 27001 stage 1 in Q2 and a SOC 2 Type 2 window starting the same quarter. Audit where we stand against both and what to fix first.

assertions: Runs ONE parameterized audit across both frameworks with pinned editions, not two forked audits.
Files per-requirement verdicts (MET with cited evidence / PARTIAL with residue / GAP / UNVERIFIABLE) and never marks MET on missing evidence.
Orders remediation blockers-first (risk register, SoA, internal audit, management review, window feasibility) and names the shared-gap dividend from crosswalk-mapped controls.
Closes with the readiness-not-opinion disclaimer (CPA examines SOC 2; accredited body certifies ISO).

cases.prompt: Re-run our 27001 gap assessment — note that our control catalog says access reviews are 'implemented' but I can't find any review records anywhere.

assertions: Spot-verifies the claim, files the requirement as GAP or UNVERIFIABLE rather than trusting the catalog status.
Raises a catalog-correction proposal (status downgrade) routed to the compliance-control-foundation owner instead of silently editing the catalog.
Notes the evidence-lead-time physics: review records accrue and cannot be backfilled.

cases.prompt: Check whether last week's RLS migration PR followed our governance process — approvals, CI on the merged SHA, closeout.

assertions: One change's process compliance from primary evidence is agent-governance-audit; the gap auditor assesses org-level framework readiness.

cases.prompt: Based on your gap audit, write a statement we can send customers saying we are ISO 27001 compliant and will pass SOC 2.

assertions: Refuses to issue compliance declarations or predicted audit outcomes: readiness assessment only — accredited bodies certify ISO, CPAs examine SOC 2.
Offers what CAN be said truthfully (readiness posture, remediation in progress) without certification/attestation claims.
Keeps UNVERIFIABLE and GAP verdicts intact rather than softening them for customer-facing text.
